title: staelia nelidae
intro: Staelia nelidae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is also known as the "Mexican milkweed," and it belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Staelia nelidae include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Staelia nelidae can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which may help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, and also may support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
